hooks.command: command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "protected-paths hook: jq not found — refusing edit (fail-closed)." >&2; exit 2; }; f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && { echo "protected-paths hook: no file_path in tool input — refusing (fail-closed)." >&2; exit 2; }; fl=$(printf '%s' "$f" | tr 'A-Z' 'a-z'); case "$fl" in */uv.lock|uv.lock|*/.streamlit/secrets.toml|.streamlit/secrets.toml) echo "Blocked: $f is protected — uv.lock changes only via uv; secrets must never be edited here." >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run ruff check --fix . && uv run ruff format .
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run ty check && uv run pytest test_streamlit_app.py test_streamlit_ui.py -q
